Video.summary: The guys install some drivetrain upgrades on their CTS-V, and paint some custom stripes on the 72 Chevelle.
Video.title: Caddy Drivetrain and Chevelle Stripes

Video.summary: Can our budget build rival a new Lexus?
Video.title: The Perfect Project Car?

Video.summary: We're building a 427ci pump-gas LSx for a Music City Trucks C10, aiming for serious hot rod power.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 1

Video.summary: We're finishing our 427ci LSx engine for Music City Trucks' C10, adding EFI and dyno-tuning it.
Video.title: 427ci LSx Part 2

Video.summary: We're twin-turboing our 600+ HP 427ci Small Block Chevy with new EFI, pushing "Baby Blue" to the limit!
Video.title: Twins for the Win

Video.summary: We introduce our Low-Fi S-10 project and look at the history of the Mini Truck Slam world.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project
Low-Fi S-10: The Hunt For A New Project

Video.summary: We tear into our Low-Fi S-10 project and the rear suspension is our focus.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: We Lay Frame

Video.summary: Our Chevy Low-Fi S-10 project continues and today is front suspension teardown and upgrades
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension
Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension
Low-Fi S-10: Altering The Front Suspension

Video.summary: We send our S-10 out to an expert who will create and install a custom audio system and interior.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior
Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior
Low-Fi S-10: New Audio System & Interior

Video.summary: We are on the home stretch of our ’95 Chevy S-10 Mini Slam Project.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together
Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together
Low-Fi S-10: This Project is Coming Together

Video.summary: The final touches are added to our ’95 Chevy S-10 Mini Truck project.
Video.title: Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!

Image.alt: Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!
Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!
Low-Fi S-10: We Wrap Up and Lay Frame!

Video.summary: Is custom exhaust worth it on a budget build?
Video.title: Tune & Tone

Video.summary: Chris Ryan's "Scarlet Lady," a custom '56 Continental Mark II, embodies truly extraordinary craftsmanship.
Video.title: Chris Ryan - Scarlet Lady

Video.summary: We take a stock 305 Chevy and a 302 Ford and find out dollar for horsepower who comes out on top.
Video.title: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Image.alt: Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown
Ford vs Chevy: Small Displacement Showdown

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: Brian and Jason unbox a budget 2011 Lexus IS 250 body kit from China. Will it fit or need cutting?
Video.title: Body Kit Bolt Ons

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew pick up a late model Cadillac and prep it for some serious speed.
Video.title: Fancy and Fast

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy wrap up their Cadillac CTSV Build with a few final details.
Video.title: Cadillac CTSV- Hammer it Home

Video.summary: This old Bronco is start of Project Crazy Horse and Stacey has got a mess on his hands.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Rust Replacement

Video.summary: We enhance Project Crazy Horse with new suspensions, wheels, and an upgraded axle.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Frame & Chassis

Video.summary: We install a new front axle and suspension on Project Crazy Horse, rejuvenating an old Ford Bronco.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Engine

Video.summary: We're revamping a 1966 Ford Bronco with a new engine and drive train, prepping it for the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Drive Train

Video.summary: We unveil two new project builds, a '56 Chevy and Mopar, at a massive muscle car graveyard.
Video.title: Field of Dreams

Video.summary: We're tearing apart a 1956 Chevrolet 210 to prep it for paint, finding rusty bolts & treasures along the way.
Video.title: Project Shell Shock – Body Moving

Video.summary: We bust rust in their Chevy 210, welding new floor pans and stripping it for paint!
Video.title: Project Shell Shock – Metal Makeover

Video.summary: We're adding new brakes, taillights, power windows, and fresh interior paint to our '56 Chevy 210 Gasser.
Video.title: Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!

Image.alt: Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!
Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!
Project Shell Shock - Brakes, Wiring & More!

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie machine a beastly Small Block Ford for serious pump-gas track power.
Video.title: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1

Image.alt: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1

Video.summary: Our 460 Big Block Ford is back! We upgrade it with a weight saving, better flowing induction.
Video.title: Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford

Image.alt: Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford
Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford
Better Breathing for our Big Block Ford

Video.summary: We dyno test a custom-built 5.3 LS crate engine and talk in-depth about the importance of quality fasteners.
Video.title: Crate Horsepower

Video.summary: We put our past engine builds to the test now that they have been installed in awesome hot rods!
Video.title: Chassis Dyno Mania

Video.summary: We transform our classic C-10 with bodywork and a flawless pearl two-tone finish.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 8: Pearlfection

Video.summary: Brian and Jason have 48 hours to finish Project Budget Baller's audio and wheel upgrades.
Video.title: Final 48 Hour Fixes

Video.summary: Our retro 1949 Chevy 3100 will end up with a great new look and Chevy's vintage straight six.
Video.title: ClasSix Part 1

Video.summary: Our classic 1949 Chevy 3100 goes under the knife to get a better front suspension that you can build yourself.
Video.title: ClasSix: Part 2

Video.summary: We're installing the drivetrain for Project ClasSix.
Video.title: ClasSix Part 8: Drivetrain Installation

Video.summary: Project: ClasSix gets a stylized interior and a budget exhaust.
Video.title: Project ClasSix Part: 10 - Interior & Exhaust

Video.summary: It's payoff day for Project: ClasSix!
Video.title: ClasSix: Part 11 - Payoff!

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy get to work restoring the engine bay and front suspension.
Video.title: Cobra Cleanup

Video.summary: Our Mustang Cobra Project Sydewinder gets its aggressive exhaust system.
Video.title: Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang

Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang
Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang

Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody

Video.summary: To keep Project Sydewinder on the ground we need a little help.
Video.title: Installing a Mustang Foxbody Wing

Video.summary: Project Sydewinder get some custom paint and graphics plus demystifying older car terms and labels.
Video.title: How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours

Image.alt: How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours
How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours
How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours

Video.summary: Engine Power gets the honor of rebuilding the 640 inch blown nitrous injected V8.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 1

Video.summary: The team visits Kaase Racing to machine the 429 inch Ford big block from the first monster truck, Big Foot #1.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 2

Video.summary: Mike and Pat assemble and dyno tune massive 640 cubic inch tri-power 429 Ford with 871 blower and nitrous.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 3

Video.summary: After 23 years in retirement, original BigFoot monster truck comes alive.
Video.title: BigFoot Lives
